hotel_name: The St. Regis Saadiyat Island Resort, Abu Dhabi

reviews.title: Worst experience ever
reviews.text: We left the car at night to the valet and the next day we were checking out and the car didn’t work cause they left the ac and the lights of the car opened outside and inside the whole night they didn’t offer us a room to change or rest for 4 hours and when we asked for a room to change our clothes they said there wasn’t an empty room and offered to change our clothes in public bathroom and there wasn’t any tools available in the hotel for such situations and we waited for 3 hours for someone from our side to fix the car and told us this is the offer so take it or leave it so we left, really disappointed from such a hotel expensive with these rude actions

reviews.title: Horrible absolutely horrible
reviews.negatives: The water was dirty rooms were run down property is dated and staff unaccommodating

reviews.title: Long weekend - building works
reviews.text: Sadly we had to move rooms and it was incredibly noisy from building works. The hotel wasn’t full and they chose to put us in a room in front of a digger. There’s building works all over Saadiyat island right now. I wouldn’t stay here. I stayed there August 2025 but I’m writing the review in April 2026 and I now live on Saadiyat island for work and there’s building works everywhere. I’d wait until it’s all done before coming here.

reviews.title: Not relaxing at all
reviews.negatives: I came to relax after stressful week but unfortunately i have been given a room near construction area room 477 i haven’t had a good sleep and ended up waking up very early and didn’t enjoy my coffee with all construction noises

reviews.title: Poor service
reviews.text:
The hotel is amazing and the beach as well. 
However the service is very bad for 5* hotel. We stayed there for 6 nights and every day we had some issues with service. Also room service is so poor, we wanted to book the Greek restaurant when I called to operator to book a table for me the operator said it’s fully booked and we decided to walk around and see and surprisingly the restaurant was half empty and the time was around 22:00 on Friday, so we knew that nobody would be there. As I said the service needs to improve. I would go next time to there, for such a value of money I would choose something better with better service.

reviews.title: Wife got infected( vomiting )from food
reviews.positives: Only beach
reviews.negatives: Room cleanliness

reviews.title: The pool
reviews.text: The resort overall was great...but the pools were not located well, since the adult pool was somewhere hidden, small and without any view, and the family pool was also kinda small...otherwise every thing seemed great.

reviews.title: Awful stuff and accommodation
reviews.negatives: We reached the hotel at 5:15pm and we should wait near 45min more because the apartment wasn’t prepared for us, after that when we came to the apartment it wasn’t prepared carefully for guests (some coffee and tea wasn’t there, also I mentioned in advance at the booking time that we will celebrate our anniversary but nothing mentioned about it at all) also it was the unit with disabled people and the receptionist told us that it’s a really perfect option with a sea view, but in reality it was just near with windows hotel stuff path and they walked back and forth and created noise with the rattling carts they carried from the kitchen. I asked to change this unit on the previous one which we booked and after 30 min waiting a response when I visited the receptionist she promised to change it after 1 hour. Just 30 min later with our family member happened incident and we should moving out from the hotel immediately and regarding this situation I kindly asked in awful state of mine (with tears because I couldn’t hold it) to cancel our staying at the hotel at all because we just officially had a check in , but in reality as I described above it wasn’t until 8pm(!). The stuff was absolutely unacceptable with their desire just get the money without understanding our family situation which absolutely destroyed us and our weekend staycation. Manager and receptionist were like robots asked to call us to the booking.com, explain everything to customer care by ourselves and completely showed on their face that guests who booked hotel apartments with this app they aren’t interested in solving problems and everything at all. The last stupid question from the main manager was about our luggage ‘did we take it or leave at the apartment?’, just remind you that at this moment I cried and immediately when our friend called us with bad news we quickly went to the reception.

reviews.title: Pools
reviews.text: The pools are kinda small.... adult pool is very small and has no view, the family pool is also small thought they were bigger from the pictures....otherwise everything seems fine

reviews.title: Not going back even if I am offered a free stay
reviews.positives:
The location and the beach
The in charge manager and staff are friendly and tried to resolve issues I encountered
reviews.negatives:
1. The bed is extremely uncomfortable very soft caused severe arched back and suffered from a severe lower back pain I couldn’t sleep well all night cause of the bed 
2. Issues with the level of cleanliness I encountered cockroach
3. I booked two rooms me and my family through booking with breakfast, during check in breakfast was confirmed first day we had breakfast me and my family the second day they tell us breakfast is only for two adults with no children although the booking is for two rooms two adults and 4 children which was confirmed at the reception 
4. The view was not mentioned in the booking and I was not given a sea side view room and my view was into the service area paying almost 6 thousand for two rooms with a service area view was not pleasant 
5. Too Overpriced for the service 
6. We ate at the lounge restaurant and smoking was allowed in the restaurant at certain area and the smell of smoke was in the non smoking restaurant area my first time I see smoking indoor in UAE

Honestly I am very disappointed and it was a complete waste of time and money

reviews.title: Awesome for families and couples
reviews.text: One thing I didn’t like : the bed is not comfortable and the sheets makes a lot of noise 😑 my mum couldn’t sleep since I am someone who moves a lot while sleeping 😅 wish they could replace the cotton with silk

reviews.title: Don’t “TRUST” St Regis Abu dhabi !!!!!
reviews.negatives:
Didn’t have the chance to see the property,, we have booked 6 rooms months ago,, we usually celebrate our family gathering in one of the well reputed resorts around the world. This year was strange and unexpected,, st Regis have cancelled our booking due to sudden governmental guests!!!!!! This is damaging Abudhabi and st. Regis reputation,, but it seems no one care
We have managed to relocate to Atlantis Dubai off course with all the related changes (transportation, meals arrangements, programs, ….)
Funny I have received an email regarding the cancellation waving the fees 😅

Usually in such cases you receive apologies and compensations but not with st. Regis Abu Dhabi 

I advise all to think twice before booking with Abu Dhabi st. Regis!!

reviews.title: Very good hotel with a nice beach and outstanding staff
reviews.text:
The check-in experience was excellent thanks to Andro who was very professional. The room was very spacious and very nice. Mr. Jimenez was very helpful and professional.
The pool was ok, nothing exceptional. The beach was nice. The beeakfast was very good with lots of varieties. Sweets provided in the breakfast (like croissants and pastries) were generally below expectations in taste even though they looked great.

reviews.title: We have booked 6 rooms for the whole family during the period 21 - 24 Feb 2024, unfortunately our reservation was cancel

reviews.title: Great place, staff is not that professional
reviews.positives:
The hotel itself is luxurious, the location is the best in Abu Dhabi, the beach was good but needs to be cleaned more often, 
for Budha bar, the experience was good, shisha needs to be changed, use pottery for better taste... 
the waiter and the Bartender Rohit were great in service, other bartender was somehow rude ....
reviews.negatives: What shocked me most was that one of the staff knocked on the door two times, and he entered the room directly after that, the situation was awkward and scary, so please always ask the reception to be aware of this, it may happen while someone is taking shower , the door is facing the door of the shower so you may be in this situation.

reviews.title: Room booking
reviews.text: Just check if your room is including the breakfast or not in order to avoid misunderstandings. Otherwise very nice experience especially for families with small kids.

reviews.title: Staffs were all friendly
reviews.text: Nice the beach it's natural and not man made with huge waves the most I like here.

reviews.title: Hot and cold.
reviews.positives:
Bathroom amazing.
Beach and doormen staff fantastic.
“Butler” and “guest relations “ zero.
Shocked by fake flowers in the lobby but then remembered the hotel is part of the tacky Marriott group.

reviews.title: Great couple’s trip
reviews.text: The price is definitely expensive,but the breakfast buffet is so amazing,many selection and the it is open until 12noon i think,i forget 😂.The facilities are cool,nice environment,clean and relaxing.

reviews.title: Acceptable
reviews.positives:
This hotel has a very special place in my heart so it’s difficult for me to write a negative review. 
This stay wasn’t best and sadly it was important day for us-Christmas.
We booked half board stay with premium price long ago to ensure that there will be availability for us 24-26.12. 

Upon arrival we were informed that we won’t be able to eat in our favorite restaurant because it’s fully booked for Christmas. We asked why we were not informed about it before so the answer was- we sent u an information. No you didn’t, there’s nothing mentioned on my email or booking.com.

After exact 1h of arguing in the reception desk we got a table for diner, but they said we have to pay additional 300aed per person since it’s a Christmas diner. 

We payed already double price for half board stay, why would we pay for this diner since no one even informed us? 

Next day during breakfast and then diner they brought us bill after finishing our food asking how would we like to pay. We were explaining multiple times that we are HALF BOARD but it’s like they don’t hear us, running around, calling reception, supervisors etc. 

St Regis is my favorite hotel in AD but this stay honestly wasn’t very comfortable.
reviews.negatives: Check in desk needs a training

reviews.title: St Regis escape for short week end
reviews.text: Perfect facilities, service and food are amazing even in the buffet.

reviews.title: Didn’t live up to my expectations. Limited restaurant choices.
reviews.positives: Location
reviews.negatives: Needs to be revamped, looked old and tired.

reviews.title: Luxurious
reviews.text:
Great hotel and staff.
Breakfast was A M A Z I N G!
the hotel has 5 restaurants which is perfect because we didn't have to look for places to eat.

reviews.title: it was ok
reviews.positives: location
reviews.negatives: I believe the building needs some maintenance specifically near the beach, I hold St. Regis Resort in a very high level and I hope it stays like that, however I believe the facilities must go through serious maintenance activities.

reviews.title: Back to this haven
reviews.text: The St. Regis at Saadiyat is a treat for every guest. We had the best staycation experience in a long time. Highly recommended for great hospitality, the beach, very comfortable rooms, a delicious Thai-fare at Sontaya and a sundowner at Buddha Bar. Always a pleasure to come back to this haven, just a little away from the city.

reviews.title: Unexpectedly average for St Regis. Not bad, not great either
reviews.positives: I liked the facilities and the staff around the hotel and cleanliness’s and comfort of the room was top.
reviews.negatives: At check in, we waited over an hour in line. It was a waste of time and no one was attending to us, no drinks, no welcome. Reception area is poorly designed. Dinner was dissatisfying. Not many options and the available options in buffett were not Regis level.

reviews.title: Excellent trip
reviews.text: Had an amazing getaway with the kids. The kids club and the athletic club are amazing. The beach is also very very good.

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.negatives: The volume in toilet was broken

reviews.title: Exceptional Stay
reviews.text: We celebrated our baby’s 1st year birthday in this hotel after months of lockdown as we wanted to stay in a 5-star hotel which will strictly adhere to Covid-19 peecautionary measures. And it did not disappoint. Aside from its commendary regulations i.e. no buffet-style breakfast but rather unlimited a la carte so guests are just sitting on their tables waiting for their ordered food, hand sanitizers all around the public areas, etc, the service of the staffs are top notch! We also received a birthday banner, cake, and birthday card on my baby’s bday! Thanks to our ever welcoming and kind butler, Sarita. Hoping for your safe surgery and fast recovery, Sarita! Hope to meet you soon!
reviews.room_type: Premium, Guest room, 2 Queen, Sea view, Balcony

reviews.title: It’s a good family resort, suitable for just chill, but don’t look for fun or anything active.
reviews.positives: The territory is huge, the staff is super friendly and helpful, the breakfast offers very wide variety, the sea view is specially beautiful due to the sea color, the bathroom area in the room is HUGE, it’s like 40% of the room. The pools are very large. A HUGE beach line which you can walk for a looooong. Great sand quality.
reviews.negatives: It felt a bit outdated. It’s St. Regis, but we couldn’t get rid of the feeling that it’s just an ordinary 5 star resort, which ticked all ticks, but there is nothing special in it! The territory is huge but so scattered, you look down from the balcony and you don’t understand the concept - how did they organize all of it, what’s the logic..? The adults pool is hidden in the corner and never goes to sun during at least winter. It felt a bit like 2010 family resort. We didn’t see people drinking, there was life music at the pool with singers with quite bad voices, there was zero music at the beach, the waiter was trying to offer at least something to the people coming, but no one was offering. You look at the left - it’s a facility, you look at the right - it’s a wild bush that looks messy and needs cleaning. We were a bit disappointed.

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.text: Amazing beach and sea provide any hotel on Saadiyat coast an advantage. In general nothing to criticize. Only an absence of Asian corner at breakfast. Chinese an Koreans will be disappointed.

the breakfast was the best thing to be honest!!

reviews.title: Good

reviews.negatives: I think there was syatem issue so checkin process took very long than expected

reviews.title: Out of this world!
reviews.text:
This is definitely one of the best stays ever for me!
A) friendliness of the staff is unmatched. Every single employee in the hotel will greet you even if you are just passing by and not looking. 

B) the butler service is crazy! They have a simple rule: you call it, you’ll have it. Period. 

C) amazing is an understatement for the beach. Clean. Calm. Serene. Turquoise. 

D) food. Oh dear lord. Undoubtedly the best hote food I’ve ever had! The variety is crazy, the taste is outstanding and the setup is perfect!

I went for our anniversary, but I told my wife we have to go religiously every couple of weekends with the kids!!!!

reviews.title: Relaxing
reviews.positives: Clean
reviews.negatives: There is always room for improvement- customer service

reviews.title: Exceptional customer service and facilities!
reviews.text: This is our 2nd time to visit St. Regis Saadiyat. Besides the beautiful beachfront, views and facilities the staffs is truly exceptional. Thank you to the team in Ginori cafe,Olea,Sontaya and the whole team.  for making our stay memorable as always

reviews.title: The best stay
reviews.text: All the staff were kind. They quickly helped with restaurant and spa reservations, which was very helpful. I stayed for three nights, and I made reservations at the hotel's restaurant all three nights. In particular, Buddha-Bar Beach was a Japanese restaurant and was delicious. The hotel's cleaning was very thorough, and the shower pressure was strong and comfortable. The beds here are the best for sleep in the world. I'm really glad I chose this hotel! Thank you very much!

reviews.title: Birthday well spent at St Regis Saadiyat
reviews.text: It’s our first time to visit this hotel, we had overnight stay. The hotel was aesthetic, clean and very accomodating staff from the time we checked in until check out.  Room was big and beautiful. They have complimentary fruits delivered in our room and since it’s my birthday, they gifted me a cake.  Breakfast had a lot of options.  Again they gave me birthday cake . Special mention to Mr Santosh who was very accommodating during breakfast. We enjoyed the pool and other amenities for kids.  Definitely a must visit hotel, highly recommended.

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.positives: Good quality building materials / finishing, beautiful gym.
reviews.negatives: The building was so huge it took a long time to walk places.  The service quality was mediocre. The breakfast buffet was overcrowded on the Sunday morning and the food was mostly tasteless.

reviews.title: Amazing experience

reviews.title: Great staycation

reviews.title: Exceptional resort, with attentive staff and well thought out facilities and extra attention to detail with the guest re
reviews.positives: Gives the feeling of actually being on holiday (I am a UAE resident) and there is nothing that the hotel hasn’t thought of! From double yet separate sinks in both the King and Twins (we had 2 Kings and 1 twin rooms) to the little bags on the beach to protect belongings from the sand as well as bottles of water available everywhere.  Butler service great and attentive.
reviews.negatives:
Some of the front of house staff were a little too officious and not too warm which was a little odd.
Beach is a long walk from the main resort.
Mazi restaurant fabulous although marginally overpriced however the food and service excellent.

reviews.title: All you can want in a resort!
reviews.text: The hospitality at this place is second to none.  We stayed here for my birthday as a first time visitor to the brand and we're totally looked after every day with special rooms, services, and treats. The breakfast spread and quality is just amazing.  Great secluded location for relaxation. Will be back soon!

reviews.title: Excellent and Family friendly resort
reviews.positives:
Great stay at the resort with all the staff very courteous and friendly from start to finish with housekeeping team making you feel comfortable.
The resort has all the facilities to make it a really relaxing stay with multiple pools for the kids to enjoy.
Amazing breakfast and nice options for dining
All staff provided friendly and professional service but look out for Concierge team who make your stay easy especially Faisal with his friendly service, Wael and Nuri during Breakfast, Tika from Butler service and Sharfa from reception.

Will come back again for sure :D

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.positives:
It was exceptional service during my recent stay at your hotel. From the warm welcome at check-in to the attentive and friendly staff throughout my visit, everything exceeded my expectations.

The cleanliness of the rooms, the quality of the food, and the overall atmosphere made my stay truly enjoyable and memorable. 
Thank you for providing such a wonderful experience. I look forward to returning in the future

reviews.title: Overall an amazing stay.
reviews.positives: Great location, very good rooms, nice attaching beach. The people around were super helpful and always helping us at the beach and pool and ensuring we enjoy our time. Amazing breakfast with great vegetarian options. Really enjoyed our stay.
reviews.negatives: We requested for a room on a higher floor 10 mins after check in and they said they’d call back but they didn’t.

reviews.title: A hallmark of the St. Regis legacy
reviews.positives: As you would expect from the St. Regis, the hospitality was nothing short of exceptional. From the moment we arrived, every detail was thoughtfully curated to ensure a flawless experience. The staff were not only professional, but genuinely warm and attentive, anticipating our needs before we even expressed them. From personalized service to refined elegance throughout the property, it was a true display of luxury at its finest — a hallmark of the St. Regis legacy.

reviews.title: "Refined Luxury and Exceptional Hospitality"
reviews.positives:
I was thoroughly impressed by the sheer elegance and attention to detail that this property embodies. From the moment I arrived, the warm welcome from Elena and impeccable service by Adil, Hark & Anas set the tone for a truly memorable experience.
The room was spacious, beautifully designed, and offered breathtaking views of the pristine beach and the Arabian Gulf. Every amenity was thoughtfully considered, adding to the sense of comfort and indulgence.
What truly stood out was the level of personalized service. The staff went above and beyond to ensure my stay was perfect, addressing every request with professionalism and genuine care.
Thank you for letting us experience the hospitality which is second to none. Well done!
reviews.negatives: May be just to add directional signage of facilities on Guest floors, i always ended up on wrong direction :D (May be there were & i didn't spot them) Rest you literally cannot point out anything one would not like.

reviews.title: Refreshing and relaxing resort 🤍🤍
reviews.positives: Amazing facilities and services. Special thanks to Francis around the pool he is the best in personalizing service. He remembered us from the previous stay and he was looking after us the whole time with smile from the heart.
reviews.negatives: Shower was cold at the beach

reviews.title: Exceptional customer  service and amazing location.
reviews.positives:
Food was excellent. Mainly all the staff right from reception to catering , house keeping all are very courteous .
Service was impeccable. Great location to spend with family.

reviews.title: Amazing weekend in Abu Dhabi
reviews.positives: It was my best experience!!! If I would rate 100 from 10 here it would be exactly what I feel. Everything we had there - service, room space, food, area, white sand beach and tears clear sea. Personal battler!!!! Multiple sweet compliments, gifts for the kids!!! Everything was amazing. And the buffet is perfect with unlimited choices of health food.

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.positives: I was welcomed in the most heartwarming and elegant and generous way! My suite was just magnificent with the most beautiful sea view. Mrs. Sana and Mrs. Haydi made sure I have a memorable stay. I am full of gratitude. Loved every bit of it.

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.positives: Absolutely everything! The room was very spacious and cozy, all amenities provided were of high quality. Super accommodating staff, very friendly & welcoming. My husband & I were there to celebrate our anniversary and they made our stay very memorable. The breakfast buffet is absolutely wonderful, super delicious and fresh food. Very very yummy food overall including the room service.
reviews.negatives: The main big pool was closed for maintenance but we were not informed upon our booking nor at check in. Although there was another outdoor adult pool which was available for use which is a bit small and crowded but it was ok in the end.

reviews.title: Très apprécié excepté samedi soir
reviews.positives: Très bel hôtel, très bien équipé (plusieurs piscines, très belle salle de sport) avec plusieurs restaurants de qualité
reviews.negatives: Le seul bémol du séjour fut une soirée DJ organisée samedi soir au bouddha bar (en face de notre chambre face à la mer) qui nous a empêché de dormir jusqu'au minuit malgré nos réclamations à la conciergerie ... Pas normal dans un 5 étoiles de ce niveau et bien sûr, pas de geste commercial. Sans cet épisode très désagréable, j'aurais mis 10.

reviews.title: The place to be
reviews.positives:
L'emplacement à quelques minutes de voiture de l'île des musées, le confort et la qualité des restaurants, la courtoisie et le professionnalisme du personnel, la vaste plage privée...
J'ai tout aimé et je reviendrai.
reviews.negatives: Rien de particulier.

reviews.title: Magnifique, splendide époustouflant
reviews.positives: Absolument fabuleux, incroyable tant la beauté et le raffinement de l’hôtel mais aussi les merveilleuse attention de toutes l’équipe de l’hôtel , des chocolats dans la chambre a plusieurs reprises , des cadeaux ballons et fleurs à notre arrivée pour l’anniversaire de mon fils , des cocktails offert, des brochettes de fruits sur la plage , vraiment les mots me manquent tellement j’ai absolument tout aimé c était parfait

reviews.title: Un des meilleurs hôtels d'Abu Dhabi
reviews.positives:
Hôtel très confortable, chambres spacieuses et dotées de magnifiques et grandes salles de bain
Service d'étage remarquable,.
Restauration de qualité : excellent petit-déjeuner, restaurants excellents avec une qualité de service exceptionnelle, tout particulièrement à Mazi, remarquable brigade de salle et encadrement, tout cela au service d'une nourriture délicieuse
Magnifique bord de mer et eau turquoise
reviews.negatives: Rien

reviews.title: Hotel Magnifique, service irréprochable
reviews.positives: Magnifique hotel, au bord d'une belle plage privée de sable fin, multiples piscines réfrigérées vu les températures très élevées en été, fantastique petit déjeuner, chambre spacieuse, excellente literie, personnel extrêmement serviable et disponible, certainement un hotel a recommander sans hesitation.

magnifiques piscines très propres  !
le personnel en particulier Matthew et Ram 
les restaurants de l’hôtel sont géniaux 
plage au top on a même vu des dauphins
reviews.negatives:
les chambres un peu vieillottes 
incompréhension sur la laundry que l’on pensait offerte et au final c’était uniquement le repassage

reviews.title: Nie wieder- gibt Besseres in AbuDhabi
reviews.positives: Frühstück war super gut.
reviews.negatives:
Hotel ist zu Gross, zu Laut und mit Russen bevölkert.
Viel zu teuer für die Qualität.

reviews.title: Über die Jahre immer top Hotel für Familien - muss aber aufpassen, das Niveau zu halten.
reviews.positives: Wir waren sicher schon fast 10x in diesem Hotel - da wir immer wieder begeistert waren, wie kinderfreundlich und zuvorkommend das Haus/der Service ist. Die Zimmer sind sehr gross, sodass eine Familien mit 4 Personen gut Platz hat (Alter der Kinder 9 und 10). Der Strand ist super, kein Müll und das Wasser sehr warm.
reviews.negatives: Dieses Mal war der Aufenthalt irgendwie nicht so perfekt wie sonst. Vielleicht lag es daran, dass wir während dem Ramandan verreisten. Abends waren die Restaurants zu gewissen Zeiten extrem voll und der Service schien nicht so motiviert wie sonst oder gar etwas überfordert. Auch die Varietät der Speisen im Buffet-Restaurant war nicht so gross wie früher, wo es dezidierte Tage mit dem Thema "Fisch" etc. gab. Geärgert hat uns, dass es bei der Abrechnung Fehler gab, die wir schon im letzten Jahr monieren mussten. Es waren Restaurantabrechnungen teils doppelt verrechnet (einmal per Tagesrechnung/einmal auf die Halbpension) - auf diese Buchungen mussten WIR das Hotel  aufmerksam machen. Zweitens (und auch das war uns bereits letztes Jahr passiert) hatte man unsere Kreditkarte, die eigentlich nur Check-In-Garantie sein sollte auch für die Endabrechnung verwendet, da wir anscheinend nicht rechtzeitig zum Checkout kamen (es hatte uns keiner darauf hingewiesen) und die Karte somit automatisiert belastet wurde. Wir wollten allerdings aufgrund der Währung mit einer anderen Karte bezahlen. Die Rückbuchung des Betrages auf die erste Karte dauerte Wochen und ich musste per Mail x Mal nachfassen. Auf der währungsbedingten Buchungsdifferenz von ca. CHF 120, die mir der Kreditkartenherausgeber belastet hatte, bleibe ich bis heute sitzen und habe auf meine Nachfrage keine Antwort. Sehr schade für ein solches Hotel.

reviews.title: Urlaub trotzdem genossen aber während Ramadan nicht unbedingt zu empfehlen da abends zum Fastenbrechen extrem viele exte
reviews.positives:
Große super saubere Zimmer 
Freundlicher Service in den Restaurants und am Pool sowie am Strand
reviews.negatives:
Wir sind sicher schon zum achten Mal hier
Die Vielfalt des Büffets hat nachgelassen auch die Themen die von Abend zu Abend wechselten 
Möglicherweise Kosteneinsparung 
Die Rezeption war nicht professionell besetzt 
Auskünfte nicht gegeben und Zimmer im Erdgeschoss gegeben die Einblicke von Außen ermöglichten sodass umgezogen werden musste

reviews.title: Sehr schöner Aufenthalt am Meer
reviews.positives: Sehr grosse Poollandschaft und wunderschöner Strand am offenen Meer! Das Abendessen hatten wir in der Buddha-Bar Beach Abu Dhabi, an der uns unsere Gastgeber Guru und Danushka sehr aufmerksam bedient und verwöhnt haben. Das Frühstücksbuffet war sehr gross, ausgesprochen und liess keine Wünsche offen. Der Schokoladenbrunnen liess Kinderaugen strahlen.

reviews.title: Sehr gutes Gesamtpaket. Die Massagen sind Weltklasse.
reviews.positives: Tolle Lage, sehr schöne Hotelanlage
reviews.negatives: Das Angebot von glutenfreien Speisen hat noch Luft nach oben

reviews.title: Top Service, Top Restauranta, für ruhesuchende und Paare nicht unbedingt geeignet,
reviews.positives: Das Personal war sehr sehr nett und professionell. Die a la carte Restaurants sind hervorragend (Buffet haben wir nicht ausprobiert). Der Strand ist wunderschön auch die Anlage ist sehr schön. Die Zimmer sind alt, aber in einem guten Zustand. Die Hauseigene Bäckerei ist fantastisch unbedingt ausprobieren! Das Fitnesscenter ist hervorragend! Zimmerservice ist ebenfalls hervorragend.
reviews.negatives: Das Hotel fokusiert fast ausschliesslich auf Familien. Natürlich ist das völlig in Ordnung, jedoch sollten Paare/Ruhesuchende dies berücksichtigen, der Lärmpegel ist enorm. Es gibt einen Adults pool, welcher unser Aufenthalt (gerettet) hat. Musik bis um 24.00 bei schlecht isolierten Zimmer. Wir hatten uns dementsprechend beklagt und tatsächlich wurde die Musiklautstärke reduziert. Dennoch fragt man sich, wieso dies nötig ist? Es ist offensichtlich, dass das Hotel in die Jahre gekommen ist.

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.positives: Alles

reviews.title: Ein Traum Hotel mit tollem Personal und Mega Strand !
reviews.positives:
Wirklich ein top Hotel ! Strand ein Traum und das Service unfassbar! So aufmerksame Mitarbeiter! 
Das cleaning im Zimmer bis zum Butler Service !
Das Frühstück unfassbar. 
Eins der besten Hotels wo ich war!
reviews.negatives: Nichts

reviews.title: erstklassige Anlage - Traumferien
reviews.positives: Luxuriös, sehr freundlich, nicht überfüllt, top Anlage
reviews.negatives: hat seinen Preis

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.positives: Frühstück bis 13:00 Uhr.. die Lage, Ausstattung und alles in einem einer unserer Favoriten in Abu Dhabi .. immer wieder ein Erlebnis

reviews.title: Top
reviews.positives: Nur dass ein Typ den ganzen Tag mit den Falken durch die Hitze läuft, ist schlimm. Die armen Vögel, zugebundene Augen und alle tätscheln die Vögel an. Grausame Tierquälerei

reviews.title: Einmalig schön und sehr zu empfehlen
reviews.positives:
Alles war fantastisch ;die Lage,die Ausstattung des Hotels,unglaublich freundliches personal,sehr zuvorkommend!
Am herrlichen Strand war der Service perfekt!

reviews.title: Bester Erholurlaub im wunderschönen Abu Dhabi
reviews.positives: Einfach alles. Es war mit Abstand das beste Hotel in dem ich je gewesen bin. Die Anlage ist atemberaubend schön und gepflegt, das Personal ist engagiert und freundlich, das Essen in den vielen hoteleigenen Restaurants ist frisch und köstlich. Die Zimmer/Suites sind wunderbar und der Butlerservice ist einzigartig.
reviews.negatives: Nichts. Es gab garnichts zu bemängeln.

reviews.title: War top - trotz der Bsustellen
reviews.positives: unglaublich gut geführt
reviews.negatives: dass ganz in der Nähe am Strand Riesenbaustellen sind

reviews.title: Unser zweiter Urlaub dort. Wir waren wieder absolut zufrieden und kommen wieder
reviews.positives: Alles sehr gut. Exzeptionell freundliches Personal. Hervorragendes Frühstück. Schöner Strand. Toller Golfplatz hinter dem Hotel. Wir kommen wieder.
reviews.negatives: Nichts

reviews.title: bis auf die störenden Großveranstaltung erneut ein wunderbarer Aufenthalt
reviews.positives: Service überall "outstanding" besonders auch vom Team am Strand
reviews.negatives: Zwei Großveranstaltungen, eine sogar mit über 800 Personen, haben uns überhaupt nicht gefallen, weil die erste am Strand extrem laut war und die zweite führte zu einem stark eingeschränkten Angebot hinsichtlich der Verfügbarkeit einiger Restaurants. Das werden wir nicht mehr akzeptieren und vor unserer nächsten Buchung abklären, um nicht wieder enttäuscht zu werden

reviews.title: Tolles Hotel nahe vielen Sehenswürdigkeiten
reviews.positives: Wir kamen dieses mal wegen dem Konzert "Saadiyat Nights" es ist sehr nahe dem Konzertgelände gelegen. Zimmer sind sehr grosszügig und schön mit Balkon und Sitzmöglichkeit. Grosses Frühstücksbuffet, es hat für jeden etwas dabei. Die Manhattan Bar ist unser Favorit, tolle Drinks und es kann geraucht werden drinnen. Das Personal im ganzen Haus ist sehr freundlich und hilfsbereit, wir kommen immer wieder gerne hierher. Danke!

reviews.title: Top Strandhotel
reviews.positives:
Das sehr freundliche Personal, vorallem Mrs. Latifa vom Empfang. Unser Zimmer war sehr geräumig und toll ausgestattet mit allem, sogar eine Nespresso Kaffeemaschine mit original Kapseln war kostenlos zur Verfügung. Das grosse Badezimmer und die bequemen Betten sind nur einige Vorzügezu erwähnen, zudem erhielten wir ein Zimmer mit toller Aussicht auf das Meer. Der Strand mit dem weissen feinen Sandstrand ist traumhaft schön und für Badefreudige sehr zu empfehlen. 
Unser Lieblingsplatz im Hotel war die wunderschöne und gut ausgestattete Manhattan Bar in der sogar Zigarren geraucht werden konnte und tolle Drinks geschlürft werden können.
reviews.negatives: Keiner wusste Bescheid, dass das Event Saadiyat Nights stattfindet. Obwohl der Veranstaltungsort in Sichtweite war. Was uns sehr überraschte.

reviews.title: Acceptable
reviews.positives: Gentilezza dello staff
reviews.negatives: Non ha nulla di un 5 stelle per chi è solito andare nei veri 5 stelle. Struttura obsoleta e basso livello

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.positives: Ogni volta la colazione e molto buona e il servizio buono
reviews.negatives: La struttura sta iniziando a diventare vecchia per quanto bellissima le camere hanno bisogno di un restyling e il prezzo è sproporzionato . Vado la da tanti anni .

reviews.title: Rapporto qualità prezzo non consono
reviews.positives: Struttura bella ma datata, molto old english, campo da golf bellissimo, spiaggia enorme bellissima, bella piscina , bar caffè the e acqua in camera molto ben fornito
reviews.negatives: A questo livello di prezzi, la tavoletta del water non fissata è inaccettabile. Cuscini scomodi , vassoio di frutta all’arrivo con frutta di’ scarsissima qualità ( al contrario di quella del buffet molto buona ) .

reviews.title: Bellisima struttura sulla spiaggia più bella di Abu Dhabi
reviews.positives: Camera bella e letto comodo, bella spiaggia, colazione ottima, buffet eccezionale
reviews.negatives: L’aria condizionata troppo forte. Quando sono arrivata in camera mi sono dovuta fare portare un piccolo termosifone perché l’aria condizionata era talmente forte che mi sono ammalata subito e sono partita con la febbre. Il freddo era terribile e anche aumentando la temperatura sul display non si riusciva a stare meglio

reviews.title: Nel complesso buono ma la camera ha bisogno di controlli migliori
reviews.positives:
La posizione 
La cucina
La piscina per adulti riscaldata
Il personale
reviews.negatives:
Il getto della doccia non regolabile 
La macchina Nespresso non funzionava

reviews.title: Excellent
reviews.positives: La posizione e l'eleganza della struttura
reviews.negatives: La stanza era bella ma un po' rumorosa

reviews.title: Relax e comfort
reviews.positives: Colazione eccellente! Posizione meravigliosa
reviews.negatives: Più scelta per il lunch in spiaggia

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.positives: Struttura fantastica. Personale super gentile. Da ritornare. Super consigliato.

reviews.title: Bella vacanza
reviews.positives: L'albergp è bellissimo, la posizione anche, molto bella. Il servizio generale molto buono, anche in spiaggia.
reviews.negatives: Il comfort del letto: il materasso è troppo morbido e non confortevole.

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.positives: Tutto molto bello, spiaggia e mare stupendi e personale gentilissimo
reviews.negatives: I fiori finti in ingresso, colorati ma non all'altezza di tutto il.resto
